extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against” rows—criminal proceedings against the Company (Nil), Directors (4), Promoters (5), Key Managerial Personnel (4), Senior Management (Nil) and Subsidiaries (Nil), totaling 13; statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company are 1 and all other against rows are Nil; tax proceedings against the Company are 7 and against Subsidiaries are Nil. I excluded all “By” rows, including the Company’s 4 criminal and 6 civil matters, and excluded promoter/director personal amounts from the aggregate. The quantified amount against the Company is ₹379.92 million, with Subsidiaries Nil, so the group aggregate is ₹379.92 million, or ₹37.992 crore; the contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated Total of ₹14.88 million as of March 31, 2025, or ₹1.488 crore, not a re-sum of line items. The customer concentration disclosure is company-wide Rental Revenue for full Fiscal 2025, using Rental Revenue as the denominator: top five Clients 12.52% and top 10 Clients 18.95%; the source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
